form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th over 450m at this track beaten 8 lengths (26.63) behind Zari Bettina in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 4. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by a neck at Bendigo over 425m (24.51) beating Cornhill Scout in Maiden on April 2. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished eighth over 425m at Bendigo, beaten 14 lengths. Hard to have this time.
